annotations: Source system for Quality team Excel workbooks.
Production: replace _mock* fields with siteUrl + servicePrincipal credentials.
Mock: backed by connectors/sharepoint_mock.SharePointMock against data/mock_sharepoint/.

_mock.note: Runner resolves this LS to a SharePointMock instance when _mock.backend == 'SharePointMock'. Drop _mock and switch backend to 'GraphSDK' for production.
